heading: Catalog of Federal domestic assistance programs
label: 6104 Catalog of Federal domestic assistance programs
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6104(a)31:1705(a)., , .Dec. 28, 1977Pub. L. 95–220, § 691 Stat. 16166104(b)31:1705(d).6104(c)31:1705(b), (c).6104(d)31:1705(e).In subsection (a), the words in parentheses are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b)(1), the word “Federal” is omitted as unnecessary. The words “system under ” are substituted for “data base” for clarity and consistency.section 6102(a) of this titleIn subsection (d), before clause (1), the text of 31:1705(e)(1) is omitted as unnecessary because of section 6102(c) of the revised title. The words “The Director” are added for clarity and consistency. The words “member of Congress” are substituted for “Members of Congress, Delegates, Resident Commissioners” for consistency. In clause (6), the words “depository library of United States Government publications” are substituted for “Federal deposit libraries” as being more precise. In clause (7), the word “depository” is substituted for “other local repositories” for clarity and to eliminate unnecessary words.

Amendments1983—Subsec. (a). , substituted “Administrator” for “Director”.Pub. L. 98–169, § 4, substituted “Director” for “Director of the Office of Management and Budget”.Pub. L. 98–169, § 1(2)Subsec. (b). , substituted “Administrator” for “Director” in provisions preceding par. (1).Pub. L. 98–169, § 4Subsec. (b)(1). , amended par. (1) generally, substituting provisions requiring that the catalog contain all substantive information on domestic assistance programs that is in the system under section 6102(a)(1), (2), and (5)–(7) of this title, and such portions or summaries, as the Administrator considers appropriate, of information in the system under section 6102(a)(3), (4) of this title, at the time the catalog is prepared, for provision requiring that the catalog contain all such information in the system under at the time the catalog was prepared.Pub. L. 98–169, § 3(e)section 6102(a) of this titleSubsecs. (b)(2), (c), (d). , substituted “Administrator” for “Director” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 98–169, § 4

children.label: a
children.text: The Administrator shall prepare and publish each year a catalog of domestic assistance programs.

children.label: A
children.text: all substantive information on domestic assistance programs that, at the time the catalog is prepared, is in the system under paragraphs (1), (2), (5), (6), and (7) of ; andsection 6102(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: such portions or summaries, as the Administrator considers appropriate, of the information on domestic assistance programs that, at the time the catalog is prepared, is in the system under paragraphs (3) and (4) of ;section 6102(a) of this title
information the Administrator decides may be helpful to a potential applicant for or beneficiary of assistance; and
specialized compilations by function of information in the catalog.
department, agency, and instrumentality of the United States Government;
general purpose unit of a local government;
Indian tribe recognized by the United States Government;
depository library of Government publications; and
